__comment__: This file was automatically created by mcresources
name: Pizza

pages.text: To make $(thing)Pizza$(), mix Dough, Salt, Basil Leaves, and 100 mB of oil in a $(l:firmalife/mixing_bowl)Mixing Bowl$(). Oil can be olive oil, or soybean oil (the product of soybean paste sealed in a barrel of water).
You'll need some shredded cheese to start with.

To make $(thing)Tomato Sauce$(), boil a tomato, salt, garlic, and water all together in a pot. Alternatively, using a $(l:firmalife/oven_appliances#vat)Vat$(), boil the crafted version of those ingredients, also known as $(thing)Tomato Sauce Mix$().
Пицца изготавливается из 1-3 овощей, приготовленного мяса или фруктов, одного измельченного сыра и одного томатного соуса.
